title: Create and deploy new content
body: # Pull Request ## Description Adds three new blog posts (`AI Governance in Real Time 2026`, `AI Operational Trust 2026 Q4`, `Edge Consentless Experiments 2026 Q4`) to expand the site's content. These pages fulfill existing references on the homepage, making previously linked content accessible. ## Type of Change - [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue) - [x] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality) - [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected) - [ ] Documentation update - [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes) - [ ] Performance improvement - [ ] Security fix ## Testing - [x] I have tested this change locally - [ ] I have added tests for this change - [x] All existing tests pass - [x] I have tested the build process ## Checklist - [x] My code follows the project's style guidelines - [x] I have performed a self-review of my code - [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas - [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation - [x] My changes generate no new warnings - [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works - [x] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes - [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published ## Screenshots (if applicable) N/A ## Additional Notes The homepage already contained references to these new blog posts; this PR creates the content pages to resolve those links. ---

title: Create and deploy new content
body: # Pull Request ## Description This PR adds several new blog posts to `src/content/posts.ts` and updates `src/components/LatestContentBanner.tsx` to advertise two of the latest entries: "Live AI Governance Metrics" and "Zero‑PII Personalization". A merge conflict in `src/content/posts.ts` was resolved to ensure all existing and new content is present. ## Type of Change - [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue) - [x] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality) - [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected) - [ ] Documentation update - [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes) - [ ] Performance improvement - [ ] Security fix ## Testing - [x] I have tested this change locally - [ ] I have added tests for this change - [x] All existing tests pass - [ ] I have tested the build process ## Checklist - [x] My code follows the project's style guidelines - [x] I have performed a self-review of my code - [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas - [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation - [x] My changes generate no new warnings - [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works - [x] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes - [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published ## Screenshots (if applicable) N/A ## Additional Notes A merge conflict in `src/content/posts.ts` was encountered and resolved by integrating both the existing content and the newly added posts. ---

title: Create and deploy new content
body: # Pull Request ## Description This PR expands the website's content by adding two new blog posts and one new case study, and integrates dedicated advertising banners on the homepage to promote this new material. The goal is to enhance the content offering and improve its visibility to users. ## Type of Change - [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue) - [x] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality) - [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected) - [ ] Documentation update - [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes) - [ ] Performance improvement - [ ] Security fix ## Testing - [x] I have tested this change locally - [ ] I have added tests for this change - [x] All existing tests pass - [ ] I have tested the build process ## Checklist - [x] My code follows the project's style guidelines - [x] I have performed a self-review of my code - [x] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas - [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation - [x] My changes generate no new warnings - [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works - [x] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes - [x] Any dependent changes have been merged and published ## Screenshots (if applicable) N/A ## Additional Notes **New Content Added:** * **Blog Posts:** * "AI 2026: Breakthrough Innovations Reshaping Enterprise Technology" (`app/blog/ai-2026-breakthrough-innovations/page.tsx`) * "AI Governance 2026: Enterprise Safety and Compliance Framework" (`app/blog/ai-governance-2026-enterprise-safety/page.tsx`) * **Case Study:** * "Fortune 500 AI Transformation: Breakthrough Success Story 2026" (`app/case-studies/fortune-500-ai-2026-breakthrough-success/page.tsx`) **Frontend Advertising:** * Three new advertising banners (`New2026ContentBreakthroughBanner`, `AIGovernance2026Banner`, `Ultimate2026ContentShowcaseBanner`) have been integrated into the homepage (`app/page.tsx`). * The new blog posts are listed on the `/blog` page and the new case study on the `/case-studies` page. ---

title: Create and deploy new content
body: # Pull Request ## Description This PR introduces new content and prominently advertises it on the frontend. Key changes include: - **New Blog Posts**: Added three new articles focusing on "AI-Powered Quantum Computing Breakthroughs 2026", "Autonomous AI Systems: Future of Enterprise Operations", and "AI Enterprise Transformation: Complete Digital Overhaul Guide 2026". - **New Service Pages**: Introduced two new service pages for "AI-Powered Quantum Computing Services 2026" and "Autonomous AI Operations Services 2026". - **Promotional Banners**: Created and integrated three new promotional banner components (`NewContent2026PromotionalBanner`, `RevolutionaryAI2026BreakthroughBanner`, `Ultimate2026ContentShowcaseBanner`) into the homepage (`app/page.tsx`) to highlight the new content. ## Type of Change - [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue) - [x] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality) - [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected) - [ ] Documentation update - [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes) - [ ] Performance improvement - [ ] Security fix ## Testing - [x] I have tested this change locally - [ ] I have added tests for this change - [x] All existing tests pass - [x] I have tested the build process ## Checklist - [x] My code follows the project's style guidelines - [x] I have performed a self-review of my code - [x] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas - [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation - [x] My changes generate no new warnings - [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works - [x] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes - [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published ## Screenshots (if applicable) N/A ## Additional Notes During the session, several scripts and a guide were created (`MERGE_CONFLICT_RESOLUTION_GUIDE.md`, `resolve_merge_conflicts.py`, `resolve-and-merge-prs.sh`, `quick_merge_fix.sh`) to address merge conflict resolution and PR merging, as requested by the user. These are included in the PR for review, but the core feature changes are the new content and promotional banners. This PR is ready for review and merging into the main branch. ---

title: Create and deploy new content
body: # Pull Request ## Description This PR introduces new content and enhances its visibility on the frontend. It includes: - Two new blog posts: "Revolutionary AI Breakthroughs: Meta-Cognitive Intelligence Achieves 95% Decision Accuracy" and "Quantum AI Enterprise Solutions: 1000x Performance Breakthrough". - Two new promotional banner components (`January2026BreakthroughContentBanner` and `Revolutionary2026ContentMegaBanner`) to advertise this content. - Integration of these new banners into `App.tsx` for prominent display. - Updates to `app/blog/page.tsx` to feature and link to the new blog posts. ## Type of Change - [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue) - [x] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality) - [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected) - [ ] Documentation update - [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes) - [ ] Performance improvement - [ ] Security fix ## Testing - [x] I have tested this change locally - [ ] I have added tests for this change - [ ] All existing tests pass - [ ] I have tested the build process ## Checklist - [x] My code follows the project's style guidelines - [x] I have performed a self-review of my code - [x] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas - [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation - [x] My changes generate no new warnings - [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works - [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes - [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published ## Screenshots (if applicable) N/A ## Additional Notes The `comprehensive-pr-merger.js`, `resolve-merge-conflicts.sh`, and `simple-merge.sh` files were generated during the process of attempting to resolve merge conflicts and merge the branch, and are not part of the application's functional changes. ---
